case_title: BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. MERLINDA S. BOJORQUEZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO
